title: Pleonotoma imperatoris-maximilianii
taxonomy: Pleonotoma imperatoris-maximilianii is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Pleonotoma. The genus Pleonotoma is a group of orchids that are native to South America. The classification of Pleonotoma imperatoris-maximilianii is within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest family of flowering plants. This orchid species is further grouped into the subfamily Cymbidioideae and the tribe Cymbidieae.
